name: Simplay Golf
about: Simplay Golf is a premier 24/7 indoor golf simulator facility located in Monticello, MN, offering year-round practice and play during its November to May season. The venue utilizes GCQuad launch monitors, the same professional-grade technology trusted by PGA Tour players, to provide players with detailed metrics on ball speed, spin rate, launch angle, and club path. With a flexible pricing model that includes both pay-as-you-go options and various membership plans, the facility is designed to accommodate everyone from casual golfers to serious practitioners looking to elevate their game.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to professional-grade GCQuad launch monitors trusted by PGA Tour players
24/7 self-service access with automated door entry via app for maximum convenience
A wide selection of world-famous courses including Pebble Beach, Augusta National, and St. Andrews

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned; BYOB policy is likely but not explicitly stated.
No alcohol service mentioned; BYOB policy is likely but not explicitly stated.

simulator_hardware.notes: Professional-grade launch monitor trusted by PGA Tour players in each bay.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own golf clubs to use at the simulator bays.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly state a policy on bringing outside food and drink, but as a self-service facility, it is likely permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required to play 18 holes, as this can vary greatly depending on the player's pace and the course chosen.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Simplay Golf appears to be kid-friendly, offering a family membership option and various game modes that could appeal to different age groups.
